name: Luscious White Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Cream cheese for body (3 packages, 8-ounce each)
recipeInstructions:
Base:
1. Combine crushed creme filled chocolate and margarine.
2. Press mixture onto bottom of 9-inch springform pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
Body:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla.
2. Mix until well blended on medium speed using an electric mixer.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
4. Blend in melted white chocolate; mix well.
5. Pour mixture over the crust.
6. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes.
7. Loosen cake from the rim of the pan and cool before removing the rim.
8. Chill the cheesecake. Garnish if desired.
